# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

<think>I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me compile my findings into a thorough report and call complete_task. I have enough information to answer all 5 questions.</think>I have gathered comprehensive information about the project. Let me compile the complete findings.

## Findings Report

### 1. Tower Types That Already Exist

The project defines **5 tower types** via the `TowerType` enum in `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs`:
- **Archer** — fires physical projectiles (Arrow-type)
- **Mage** — fires magic projectiles (Magic-type)
- **Barracks** — meant to spawn soldiers (the `SpawnSoldiers()` method exists but is **empty/stub** — no soldiers implemented yet)
- **Artillery** — fires explosive projectiles with splash radius (Cannonball-type)
- **Sword** — fires piercing projectiles that hit multiple enemies

**Actual .asset files found**: Only **2 tower data assets** exist in `Assets/Resources/Data/Towers/`:
- `火箭塔.asset` (Rocket Tower)
- `剑塔.asset` (Sword Tower)

**Prefabs found**: `Assets/Prefabs/Towers/` contains only:
- `Tower_Archer.prefab` and `Tower_Archer 1.prefab` (Archer towers)
- `TowerSlot_01.prefab` (the placement slot)

So the code defines 5 types but only **2 tower data assets** and **1 tower prefab (Archer)** are actually set up.

---

### 2. Tower Data Model Structure

Found in `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs`:

```csharp
public class TowerData : ScriptableObject {
    string towerName;
    string description;
    TowerType towerType;               // Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword
    GameObject towerPrefab;            // The 3D/2D visual prefab
    GameObject projectilePrefab;       // The projectile to fire
    Sprite icon;                       // UI icon
    TowerStats[] levels;               // Each level's stats
}

struct TowerStats {
    int level, cost, upgradeCost, sellValue;
    float damage, attackRange, attackSpeed;
    ProjectileType projectileType;     // Arrow, Magic, Cannonball, None
    int projectileCount;
    float splashRadius, slowAmount, slowDuration;
    int maxTargets, pierceCount;
}
```

The `Tower` game component (in `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Tower.cs`) consumes `TowerData` and provides:
- `Initialize()` — sets level 1 stats
- `FindTarget()` / `FindBestTarget()` — prioritizes enemies by path progress
- `Attack()` — delegates to `TowerAttack`
- `Upgrade()` / `Sell()` — level management
- `ShowRange()` / `HideRange()` — range indicator visuals

`TowerAttack` (`Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerAttack.cs`) routes attacks by `TowerType`:
- **Archer** → `FireProjectile()` (homing, single target)
- **Mage** → `FireMagicAttack()` (homing, magic damage)
- **Barracks** → `SpawnSoldiers()` → **EMPTY METHOD (TODO)**
- **Artillery** → `FireExplosive()` (splash damage)
- **Sword** → `FirePierceProjectile()` (line/pierce attack)

The `Projectile` class (`Assets/Scripts/Tower/Projectile.cs`) supports homing movement, splash damage, and pierce logic.

**Level/slot system**: `LevelData` (`Assets/Scripts/Data/LevelData.cs`) defines the map layout with `SlotType` (Normal, Premium, Restricted). `TowerSlot` handles placement with gold validation via `GameManager`.

---

### 3. Art Style — 2D Sprites

This is a **2D sprite-based** project, **not 3D**. Evidence:

- **Kenney Tower Defense Top-Down pack**: The project includes the full `kenney_tower-defense-top-down` asset pack with 299+ PNG sprites at `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/Default size/`. This is the primary tile/path art.
- **2D animated skeletons**: `Assets/BluBlu Games/2D Animated Skeletons/` — skeleton enemy sprites
- **2D Casual Monsters**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Characters-CasualMonsters/` — character sprites
- **2D Icon Packs**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Icons-PictoIconPack01/` — UI icons
- **Tile assets**: `.asset` files in `Assets/Art/Tiles/` are Unity Tile assets (for Tilemap system)
- **Empty art folders**: `Assets/Art/Towers/`, `Assets/Art/Characters/`, `Assets/Art/Enemies/` exist but are **empty** — the actual sprite art lives under the third-party pack directories
- **All prefabs use 2D components**: `SpriteRenderer` (not MeshRenderer), `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D.Raycast`, etc.
- **Projectile prefabs**: Only `Projectile_Arrow.prefab` exists (2D arrow sprite)

---

### 4. Soldier/Minion/Unit System

**There is NO implemented soldier/unit system.** The `Barracks` tower type exists in the `TowerType` enum, and `TowerAttack` has `SpawnSoldiers()` method, but it is **completely empty**:

```csharp
protected virtual void SpawnSoldiers(Enemy.Enemy target)
{
    // EMPTY — nothing implemented
}
```

There are:
- No soldier/minion prefabs
- No soldier data scripts or classes
- No AI or pathfinding for friendly units
- No soldier spawn logic anywhere in the codebase

**What does exist instead**: A **Hero** system:
- `HeroData` (`Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs`) — ScriptableObject for hero stats and skills
- `Hero.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`) — a controllable hero unit with movement, attack, skills, leveling, health regen
- `HeroController.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/HeroController.cs`) — right-click movement, Q/W/E skill keys
- **No hero prefabs** found in `Assets/Prefabs/Heroes/` (empty directory)

The hero acts as a player-controlled champion, but the soldier spawning (Barracks tower) is entirely unimplemented.

---

### 5. Overall Art Direction

The project uses **2D pixel art/top-down sprite style**, specifically the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** asset pack (free CC0 asset pack). Key characteristics:

- **Top-down perspective** (bird's-eye view)
- **Pixel art sprites** — tiles are small square sprites for tilemaps
- **Cartoon/whimsical color palette** — green grass tiles, blue/grey path tiles, colorful tower sprites (typical Kenney style)
- **2D UI** — built with Unity Canvas + uGUI (Text, Image, Button, Slider components)
- **Chinese localization**: UI texts are in Chinese (e.g., "画布" for Canvas, "塔选择面板" for Tower Select Panel, "波次" for Wave, "箭塔" for Archer Tower)
- **Casual/accessible** visual direction — not realistic, not low-poly (since it's 2D), fits a mobile-friendly casual tower defense aesthetic

**Summary**: This is a **2D top-down sprite-based tower defense game** with 5 code-defined tower types (Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword), but only 2 data assets and 1 functioning prefab are implemented. The soldier system (Barracks) is a stub. A hero system exists separately. The art uses Kenney's free pixel art pack with Chinese-localized UI.

---

### Key File Locations

| Area | Path |
|------|------|
| Tower data model | `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` |
| Tower runtime behavior | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Tower.cs` |
| Tower attack logic | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerAttack.cs` |
| Projectile system | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Projectile.cs` |
| Tower placement slot | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerSlot.cs` |
| Tower data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Towers/火箭塔.asset`, `剑塔.asset` |
| Tower prefabs | `Assets/Prefabs/Towers/Tower_Archer.prefab` |
| Art (Kenney pack) | `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/` (299 sprites) |
| Hero system | `Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs` |
| Hero data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs` |
| Enemy system | `Assets/Scripts/Enemy/Enemy.cs`, `EnemySpawner.cs` |
| Enemy data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Enemies/飞机.asset`, `骷髅.asset` |
| Level data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/LevelData.cs` |
| Wave system | `Assets/Scripts/Wave/WaveManager.cs` |
| Game config | `Assets/Scripts/Data/Config/GameConfig.cs` |
| Game manager | `Assets/Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs` |
| UI panels | `Assets/Scripts/UI/TowerSelectPanel.cs`, `TowerInfoPanel.cs` |

args.result:
## Project Evaluation Complete

I thoroughly explored the Unity tower defense project at `C:\Users\97809\Desktop\sttop5` across all 5 dimensions. Here is the complete summary:

### 1. Tower Types
**5 tower types defined in code** (`Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` via `TowerType` enum): Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword. However, **only 2 tower data assets exist** (火箭塔.asset = Rocket Tower? and 剑塔.asset = Sword Tower) and **only 1 tower prefab** (Tower_Archer.prefab). The remaining 3 types exist in code/logic only.

### 2. Tower Data Model
`TowerData` is a ScriptableObject with `string towerName`, `TowerType towerType`, `GameObject towerPrefab/projectilePrefab`, `Sprite icon`, and `TowerStats[] levels`. Each `TowerStats` has cost, damage, range, attackSpeed, projectileType, splashRadius, slowAmount, pierceCount, etc. The `Tower` component uses these stats for targeting (prioritizes path progress), attacking (delegates to `TowerAttack`), upgrading, and selling.

### 3. Art Style — 2D Sprites (Pixel Art)
This is unequivocally **2D sprite-based**. The project imports the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** free asset pack (299+ PNG sprites at `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/Default size/`). It also includes 2D animated skeletons (BluBlu Games) and 2D CasualMonsters characters (Layer Lab). The project uses `SpriteRenderer`, `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D`, and Unity Tilemap `.asset` tiles for the map.

### 4. Soldier/Unit System — NOT IMPLEMENTED
The Barracks tower type has a `SpawnSoldiers()` method in `TowerAttack.cs` but it is **entirely empty** — no soldier spawning logic exists. There are no soldier prefabs, data scripts, or AI. Instead, a **Hero system** exists (`Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs`) with a single controllable champion using right-click movement and Q/W/E skills. The Hero prefabs folder is empty — the hero system is code-complete but asset-incomplete.

### 5. Art Direction — Casual 2D Top-Down Pixel Art
Chinese-localized UI (画布/Canvas, 塔选择面板/TowerSelectPanel), cartoon pixel art from Kenney asset pack, top-down perspective, mobile-friendly UI layout. Not realistic, not 3D/low-poly — purely 2D sprite-based casual tower defense.

### Next Steps
The Barracks tower's soldier spawning is the largest gap — the code hook exists but needs full implementation (soldier prefabs, AI movement, data model). The 5 tower types have only partial asset coverage (2 data assets, 1 functioning prefab). The hero system has code but no prefabs.
args.next_steps: The largest gaps to address: 1) Implement the Barracks soldier spawning system (SpawnSoldiers() is empty) 2) Create tower data assets for Mage, Archer, and Artillery tower types 3) Create matching tower prefabs with sprite visuals 4) Set up hero prefabs using the 2D CasualMonsters assets

### 1. Tower Types
**5 tower types defined in code** (`Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` via `TowerType` enum): Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword. However, **only 2 tower data assets exist** (火箭塔.asset = Rocket Tower? and 剑塔.asset = Sword Tower) and **only 1 tower prefab** (Tower_Archer.prefab). The remaining 3 types exist in code/logic only.

### 2. Tower Data Model
`TowerData` is a ScriptableObject with `string towerName`, `TowerType towerType`, `GameObject towerPrefab/projectilePrefab`, `Sprite icon`, and `TowerStats[] levels`. Each `TowerStats` has cost, damage, range, attackSpeed, projectileType, splashRadius, slowAmount, pierceCount, etc. The `Tower` component uses these stats for targeting (prioritizes path progress), attacking (delegates to `TowerAttack`), upgrading, and selling.

### 3. Art Style — 2D Sprites (Pixel Art)
This is unequivocally **2D sprite-based**. The project imports the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** free asset pack (299+ PNG sprites at `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/Default size/`). It also includes 2D animated skeletons (BluBlu Games) and 2D CasualMonsters characters (Layer Lab). The project uses `SpriteRenderer`, `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D`, and Unity Tilemap `.asset` tiles for the map.

### 4. Soldier/Unit System — NOT IMPLEMENTED
The Barracks tower type has a `SpawnSoldiers()` method in `TowerAttack.cs` but it is **entirely empty** — no soldier spawning logic exists. There are no soldier prefabs, data scripts, or AI. Instead, a **Hero system** exists (`Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs`) with a single controllable champion using right-click movement and Q/W/E skills. The Hero prefabs folder is empty — the hero system is code-complete but asset-incomplete.

### 5. Art Direction — Casual 2D Top-Down Pixel Art
Chinese-localized UI (画布/Canvas, 塔选择面板/TowerSelectPanel), cartoon pixel art from Kenney asset pack, top-down perspective, mobile-friendly UI layout. Not realistic, not 3D/low-poly — purely 2D sprite-based casual tower defense.

### Next Steps
The Barracks tower's soldier spawning is the largest gap — the code hook exists but needs full implementation (soldier prefabs, AI movement, data model). The 5 tower types have only partial asset coverage (2 data assets, 1 functioning prefab). The hero system has code but no prefabs.

Next steps:
The largest gaps to address: 1) Implement the Barracks soldier spawning system (SpawnSoldiers() is empty) 2) Create tower data assets for Mage, Archer, and Artillery tower types 3) Create matching tower prefabs with sprite visuals 4) Set up hero prefabs using the 2D CasualMonsters assets

--- Context from: .codely-cli\extensions\unity-master-skill-library\CODELY.md ---
# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")
activate_skill("level-extract-developer")

# 试玩广告
activate_skill("playable-ad-planner")
activate_skill("playable-ad-developer")

# 游戏开发工作流
activate_skill("game-dev-planner")
activate_skill("game-dev-developer")
activate_skill("game-dev-debugger")

# AI 资产生成
activate_skill("generate_3d_model")
activate_skill("generate_animated_character")
activate_skill("generate_rigged_animated_model")
activate_skill("generate_sprite")
activate_skill("generate_sprite_sequence")
activate_skill("generate_image")
activate_skill("generate_material")
activate_skill("generate_skybox")
activate_skill("generate_audio_clip")
activate_skill("generate_sound_effect")
activate_skill("generate_terrain")
activate_skill("generate_video")
activate_skill("search_assets")

# AI 资产生产
activate_skill("fbx-humanoid-auto-rig")
activate_skill("place_assets_in_scene")

# 开发进化
activate_skill("log-analyzer")
activate_skill("session-profiler")

# Unity 专家
activate_skill("lighting")
activate_skill("cinemachine")
activate_skill("scene-creator")
activate_skill("ui-system-router")
```

## 技能依赖关系

```text
level-extract-planner → level-extract-developer
editor-plan-agent → editor-module-agent (关卡抽取子代理)

playable-ad-planner → playable-ad-developer

game-dev-planner → game-dev-developer → game-dev-debugger → log-analyzer → session-profiler

ai-generation-planner → 3d-model-generator | animated-character-generator | audio-generator | image-generator | material-generator | skybox-generator | sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator | search-assets | video-generator

generate_3d_model → place_assets_in_scene
generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

## 文件结构

```text

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |

| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

generate_animated_character → place_assets_in_scene
generate_sprite → place_assets_in_scene
generate_terrain → place_assets_in_scene
search_assets → search-assets → place_assets_in_scene
generate_video → video-generator

2d-character → auto-wire
ui-system-router → imgui | ugui | ui-toolkit
```

<think>I now have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me compile my findings into a thorough report and call complete_task. I have enough information to answer all 5 questions.</think>I have gathered comprehensive information about the project. Let me compile the complete findings.

## Findings Report

### 1. Tower Types That Already Exist

The project defines **5 tower types** via the `TowerType` enum in `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs`:
- **Archer** — fires physical projectiles (Arrow-type)
- **Mage** — fires magic projectiles (Magic-type)
- **Barracks** — meant to spawn soldiers (the `SpawnSoldiers()` method exists but is **empty/stub** — no soldiers implemented yet)
- **Artillery** — fires explosive projectiles with splash radius (Cannonball-type)
- **Sword** — fires piercing projectiles that hit multiple enemies

**Actual .asset files found**: Only **2 tower data assets** exist in `Assets/Resources/Data/Towers/`:
- `火箭塔.asset` (Rocket Tower)
- `剑塔.asset` (Sword Tower)

**Prefabs found**: `Assets/Prefabs/Towers/` contains only:
- `Tower_Archer.prefab` and `Tower_Archer 1.prefab` (Archer towers)
- `TowerSlot_01.prefab` (the placement slot)

So the code defines 5 types but only **2 tower data assets** and **1 tower prefab (Archer)** are actually set up.

---

### 2. Tower Data Model Structure

Found in `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs`:

```csharp
public class TowerData : ScriptableObject {
    string towerName;
    string description;
    TowerType towerType;               // Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword
    GameObject towerPrefab;            // The 3D/2D visual prefab
    GameObject projectilePrefab;       // The projectile to fire
    Sprite icon;                       // UI icon
    TowerStats[] levels;               // Each level's stats
}

struct TowerStats {
    int level, cost, upgradeCost, sellValue;
    float damage, attackRange, attackSpeed;
    ProjectileType projectileType;     // Arrow, Magic, Cannonball, None
    int projectileCount;
    float splashRadius, slowAmount, slowDuration;
    int maxTargets, pierceCount;
}
```

The `Tower` game component (in `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Tower.cs`) consumes `TowerData` and provides:
- `Initialize()` — sets level 1 stats
- `FindTarget()` / `FindBestTarget()` — prioritizes enemies by path progress
- `Attack()` — delegates to `TowerAttack`
- `Upgrade()` / `Sell()` — level management
- `ShowRange()` / `HideRange()` — range indicator visuals

`TowerAttack` (`Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerAttack.cs`) routes attacks by `TowerType`:
- **Archer** → `FireProjectile()` (homing, single target)
- **Mage** → `FireMagicAttack()` (homing, magic damage)
- **Barracks** → `SpawnSoldiers()` → **EMPTY METHOD (TODO)**
- **Artillery** → `FireExplosive()` (splash damage)
- **Sword** → `FirePierceProjectile()` (line/pierce attack)

The `Projectile` class (`Assets/Scripts/Tower/Projectile.cs`) supports homing movement, splash damage, and pierce logic.

**Level/slot system**: `LevelData` (`Assets/Scripts/Data/LevelData.cs`) defines the map layout with `SlotType` (Normal, Premium, Restricted). `TowerSlot` handles placement with gold validation via `GameManager`.

---

### 3. Art Style — 2D Sprites

This is a **2D sprite-based** project, **not 3D**. Evidence:

- **Kenney Tower Defense Top-Down pack**: The project includes the full `kenney_tower-defense-top-down` asset pack with 299+ PNG sprites at `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/Default size/`. This is the primary tile/path art.
- **2D animated skeletons**: `Assets/BluBlu Games/2D Animated Skeletons/` — skeleton enemy sprites
- **2D Casual Monsters**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Characters-CasualMonsters/` — character sprites
- **2D Icon Packs**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Icons-PictoIconPack01/` — UI icons
- **Tile assets**: `.asset` files in `Assets/Art/Tiles/` are Unity Tile assets (for Tilemap system)
- **Empty art folders**: `Assets/Art/Towers/`, `Assets/Art/Characters/`, `Assets/Art/Enemies/` exist but are **empty** — the actual sprite art lives under the third-party pack directories
- **All prefabs use 2D components**: `SpriteRenderer` (not MeshRenderer), `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D.Raycast`, etc.
- **Projectile prefabs**: Only `Projectile_Arrow.prefab` exists (2D arrow sprite)

---

### 4. Soldier/Minion/Unit System

**There is NO implemented soldier/unit system.** The `Barracks` tower type exists in the `TowerType` enum, and `TowerAttack` has `SpawnSoldiers()` method, but it is **completely empty**:

```csharp
protected virtual void SpawnSoldiers(Enemy.Enemy target)
{
    // EMPTY — nothing implemented
}
```

There are:
- No soldier/minion prefabs
- No soldier data scripts or classes
- No AI or pathfinding for friendly units
- No soldier spawn logic anywhere in the codebase

**What does exist instead**: A **Hero** system:
- `HeroData` (`Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs`) — ScriptableObject for hero stats and skills
- `Hero.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`) — a controllable hero unit with movement, attack, skills, leveling, health regen
- `HeroController.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/HeroController.cs`) — right-click movement, Q/W/E skill keys
- **No hero prefabs** found in `Assets/Prefabs/Heroes/` (empty directory)

The hero acts as a player-controlled champion, but the soldier spawning (Barracks tower) is entirely unimplemented.

---

### 5. Overall Art Direction

The project uses **2D pixel art/top-down sprite style**, specifically the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** asset pack (free CC0 asset pack). Key characteristics:

- **Top-down perspective** (bird's-eye view)
- **Pixel art sprites** — tiles are small square sprites for tilemaps
- **Cartoon/whimsical color palette** — green grass tiles, blue/grey path tiles, colorful tower sprites (typical Kenney style)
- **2D UI** — built with Unity Canvas + uGUI (Text, Image, Button, Slider components)
- **Chinese localization**: UI texts are in Chinese (e.g., "画布" for Canvas, "塔选择面板" for Tower Select Panel, "波次" for Wave, "箭塔" for Archer Tower)
- **Casual/accessible** visual direction — not realistic, not low-poly (since it's 2D), fits a mobile-friendly casual tower defense aesthetic

**Summary**: This is a **2D top-down sprite-based tower defense game** with 5 code-defined tower types (Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword), but only 2 data assets and 1 functioning prefab are implemented. The soldier system (Barracks) is a stub. A hero system exists separately. The art uses Kenney's free pixel art pack with Chinese-localized UI.

---

### Key File Locations

| Area | Path |
|------|------|
| Tower data model | `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` |
| Tower runtime behavior | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Tower.cs` |
| Tower attack logic | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerAttack.cs` |
| Projectile system | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Projectile.cs` |
| Tower placement slot | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerSlot.cs` |
| Tower data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Towers/火箭塔.asset`, `剑塔.asset` |
| Tower prefabs | `Assets/Prefabs/Towers/Tower_Archer.prefab` |
| Art (Kenney pack) | `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/` (299 sprites) |
| Hero system | `Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs` |
| Hero data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs` |
| Enemy system | `Assets/Scripts/Enemy/Enemy.cs`, `EnemySpawner.cs` |
| Enemy data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Enemies/飞机.asset`, `骷髅.asset` |
| Level data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/LevelData.cs` |
| Wave system | `Assets/Scripts/Wave/WaveManager.cs` |
| Game config | `Assets/Scripts/Data/Config/GameConfig.cs` |
| Game manager | `Assets/Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs` |
| UI panels | `Assets/Scripts/UI/TowerSelectPanel.cs`, `TowerInfoPanel.cs` |

- **2D Casual Monsters**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Characters-CasualMonsters/` — character sprites
- **2D Icon Packs**: `Assets/Layer Lab/2D Icons-PictoIconPack01/` — UI icons
- **Tile assets**: `.asset` files in `Assets/Art/Tiles/` are Unity Tile assets (for Tilemap system)
- **Empty art folders**: `Assets/Art/Towers/`, `Assets/Art/Characters/`, `Assets/Art/Enemies/` exist but are **empty** — the actual sprite art lives under the third-party pack directories
- **All prefabs use 2D components**: `SpriteRenderer` (not MeshRenderer), `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D.Raycast`, etc.
- **Projectile prefabs**: Only `Projectile_Arrow.prefab` exists (2D arrow sprite)

---

### 4. Soldier/Minion/Unit System

**There is NO implemented soldier/unit system.** The `Barracks` tower type exists in the `TowerType` enum, and `TowerAttack` has `SpawnSoldiers()` method, but it is **completely empty**:

```csharp
protected virtual void SpawnSoldiers(Enemy.Enemy target)
{
    // EMPTY — nothing implemented
}
```

There are:
- No soldier/minion prefabs
- No soldier data scripts or classes
- No AI or pathfinding for friendly units
- No soldier spawn logic anywhere in the codebase

**What does exist instead**: A **Hero** system:
- `HeroData` (`Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs`) — ScriptableObject for hero stats and skills
- `Hero.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`) — a controllable hero unit with movement, attack, skills, leveling, health regen
- `HeroController.cs` (`Assets/Scripts/Hero/HeroController.cs`) — right-click movement, Q/W/E skill keys
- **No hero prefabs** found in `Assets/Prefabs/Heroes/` (empty directory)

The hero acts as a player-controlled champion, but the soldier spawning (Barracks tower) is entirely unimplemented.

---

### 5. Overall Art Direction

The project uses **2D pixel art/top-down sprite style**, specifically the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** asset pack (free CC0 asset pack). Key characteristics:

- **Top-down perspective** (bird's-eye view)
- **Pixel art sprites** — tiles are small square sprites for tilemaps
- **Cartoon/whimsical color palette** — green grass tiles, blue/grey path tiles, colorful tower sprites (typical Kenney style)
- **2D UI** — built with Unity Canvas + uGUI (Text, Image, Button, Slider components)
- **Chinese localization**: UI texts are in Chinese (e.g., "画布" for Canvas, "塔选择面板" for Tower Select Panel, "波次" for Wave, "箭塔" for Archer Tower)
- **Casual/accessible** visual direction — not realistic, not low-poly (since it's 2D), fits a mobile-friendly casual tower defense aesthetic

**Summary**: This is a **2D top-down sprite-based tower defense game** with 5 code-defined tower types (Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword), but only 2 data assets and 1 functioning prefab are implemented. The soldier system (Barracks) is a stub. A hero system exists separately. The art uses Kenney's free pixel art pack with Chinese-localized UI.

---

### Key File Locations

| Area | Path |
|------|------|
| Tower data model | `Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` |
| Tower runtime behavior | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Tower.cs` |
| Tower attack logic | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerAttack.cs` |
| Projectile system | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/Projectile.cs` |
| Tower placement slot | `Assets/Scripts/Tower/TowerSlot.cs` |
| Tower data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Towers/火箭塔.asset`, `剑塔.asset` |
| Tower prefabs | `Assets/Prefabs/Towers/Tower_Archer.prefab` |
| Art (Kenney pack) | `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/` (299 sprites) |
| Hero system | `Assets/Scripts/Hero/Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs` |
| Hero data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/HeroData.cs` |
| Enemy system | `Assets/Scripts/Enemy/Enemy.cs`, `EnemySpawner.cs` |
| Enemy data assets | `Assets/Resources/Data/Enemies/飞机.asset`, `骷髅.asset` |
| Level data | `Assets/Scripts/Data/LevelData.cs` |
| Wave system | `Assets/Scripts/Wave/WaveManager.cs` |
| Game config | `Assets/Scripts/Data/Config/GameConfig.cs` |
| Game manager | `Assets/Scripts/Core/GameManager.cs` |
| UI panels | `Assets/Scripts/UI/TowerSelectPanel.cs`, `TowerInfoPanel.cs` |

args.result:
## Project Evaluation Complete

I thoroughly explored the Unity tower defense project at `C:\Users\97809\Desktop\sttop5` across all 5 dimensions. Here is the complete summary:

### 1. Tower Types
**5 tower types defined in code** (`Assets/Scripts/Data/TowerData.cs` via `TowerType` enum): Archer, Mage, Barracks, Artillery, Sword. However, **only 2 tower data assets exist** (火箭塔.asset = Rocket Tower? and 剑塔.asset = Sword Tower) and **only 1 tower prefab** (Tower_Archer.prefab). The remaining 3 types exist in code/logic only.

### 2. Tower Data Model
`TowerData` is a ScriptableObject with `string towerName`, `TowerType towerType`, `GameObject towerPrefab/projectilePrefab`, `Sprite icon`, and `TowerStats[] levels`. Each `TowerStats` has cost, damage, range, attackSpeed, projectileType, splashRadius, slowAmount, pierceCount, etc. The `Tower` component uses these stats for targeting (prioritizes path progress), attacking (delegates to `TowerAttack`), upgrading, and selling.

### 3. Art Style — 2D Sprites (Pixel Art)
This is unequivocally **2D sprite-based**. The project imports the **Kenney "Tower Defense Top-Down"** free asset pack (299+ PNG sprites at `Assets/kenney_tower-defense-top-down/PNG/Default size/`). It also includes 2D animated skeletons (BluBlu Games) and 2D CasualMonsters characters (Layer Lab). The project uses `SpriteRenderer`, `CircleCollider2D`, `Physics2D`, and Unity Tilemap `.asset` tiles for the map.

### 4. Soldier/Unit System — NOT IMPLEMENTED
The Barracks tower type has a `SpawnSoldiers()` method in `TowerAttack.cs` but it is **entirely empty** — no soldier spawning logic exists. There are no soldier prefabs, data scripts, or AI. Instead, a **Hero system** exists (`Hero.cs`, `HeroController.cs`) with a single controllable champion using right-click movement and Q/W/E skills. The Hero prefabs folder is empty — the hero system is code-complete but asset-incomplete.

### 5. Art Direction — Casual 2D Top-Down Pixel Art
Chinese-localized UI (画布/Canvas, 塔选择面板/TowerSelectPanel), cartoon pixel art from Kenney asset pack, top-down perspective, mobile-friendly UI layout. Not realistic, not 3D/low-poly — purely 2D sprite-based casual tower defense.

### Next Steps
The Barracks tower's soldier spawning is the largest gap — the code hook exists but needs full implementation (soldier prefabs, AI movement, data model). The 5 tower types have only partial asset coverage (2 data assets, 1 functioning prefab). The hero system has code but no prefabs.
args.next_steps: The largest gaps to address: 1) Implement the Barracks soldier spawning system (SpawnSoldiers() is empty) 2) Create tower data assets for Mage, Archer, and Artillery tower types 3) Create matching tower prefabs with sprite visuals 4) Set up hero prefabs using the 2D CasualMonsters assets

--- Context from: .codely-cli\extensions\unity-master-skill-library\CODELY.md ---
# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |

## 使用方式

```bash
# 激活特定技能
activate_skill("<skill-name>")

# 关卡抽取
activate_skill("level-extract-planner")

--- Context from: .codely-cli\extensions\unity-master-skill-library\CODELY.md ---
# Unity Master Skill Library

## 概述

本扩展当前提供 **34 个专业技能 + 12 个子代理**，覆盖关卡抽取、试玩广告制作、游戏开发工作流、开发进化分析、AI 资产生成、AI 资产生产、UI 系统、环境渲染、游戏机制九大领域，为 Unity 开发提供全方位专家指导。同时内置 **40+ 篇** 调试经验文档、试玩广告模板和常用代码模板。

## 技能分类

### 关卡抽取 (Level Extract)

从 Unity 项目中抽取指定关卡，移除网络/广告/统计/存档/远程配置等依赖，生成纯单机试玩广告版本。

| Skill                     | 名称               | 说明                                                                                   |
| ------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `level-extract-planner`   | 关卡抽取规划器     | 根据需求文档分析项目结构，生成模块化执行计划（ExecutionPlan.md），将改造拆解为独立模块 |
| `level-extract-developer` | 关卡抽取开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的 ExecutionPlan.md，逐模块执行改造，每模块通过编译门禁并 git commit  |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                 | 说明                                        |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------------------- |
| `editor-plan-agent`   | 改造规划子代理 - 生成/更新 ExecutionPlan.md |
| `editor-module-agent` | 改造执行子代理 - 执行具体模块并通过编译门禁 |

适用场景：试玩、抽关、关卡抽取、playable ads、微信试玩、抖音试玩、单关卡版本、离线版本

**工作流**：

```text
用户提供需求文档 → level-extract-planner → ExecutionPlan.md → level-extract-developer → 改造完成
```

### 试玩广告制作 (Playable Ad)

| Skill                   | 名称               | 说明                                                                                                         |
| ----------------------- | ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `playable-ad-planner`   | 试玩广告规划器     | 根据游戏类型和现有素材，规划 30 秒试玩广告的完整流程（开始页→游戏玩法→结算页），生成资产需求清单和开发教程   |
| `playable-ad-developer` | 试玩广告开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，优先使用现有资产，无可用资产时调用 TJGenerator 生成，快速实现 30 秒试玩广告体验 |

### 游戏开发工作流 (Game Dev Workflow)

| Skill                | 名称           | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `game-dev-planner`   | 游戏教程规划器 | 根据游戏类型生成 AI 可执行的开发教程和资产需求清单，交接给 developer |
| `game-dev-developer` | 游戏开发执行器 | 消费 planner 产出的交接产物，先生成资产再直接开发游戏                |
| `game-dev-debugger`  | 游戏调试执行器 | 检索开发经验知识库，为游戏开发/生成过程中的调试问题提供支持          |

### 开发进化分析 (Game Evolution)

| Skill              | 名称           | 说明                                                                                              |
| ------------------ | -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `log-analyzer`     | 日志分析器     | 从开发会话日志中提取 bug、失败模式和可复用经验，去重后自动生成经验文档写入知识库                  |
| `session-profiler` | 会话性能分析器 | 解析聊天日志，统计工具调用次数与失败率、Skill 激活、Sub-Agent 调度、耗时分布，生成 Profiling 报告 |

### AI 资产生成 (TJGenerators)

集成团结 AI 平台的多模态生成能力，无缝嵌入 Unity 编辑器工作流。

| Skill                            | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| -------------------------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `generate_3d_model`              | 3D 模型生成        | 生成静态 3D 模型；默认优先 Tripo P1，高精度 / PBR / FBX 场景可切换腾讯混元 3D |
| `generate_animated_character`    | 动画角色生成       | 生成带骨骼动画的 Humanoid 角色                                       |
| `generate_rigged_animated_model` | 绑骨动画模型生成   | 为现有模型绑骨和/或生成动作动画                                      |
| `generate_sprite`                | 精灵生成           | 生成 2D 精灵资产（图标、物品图、角色肖像等）                         |
| `generate_sprite_sequence`       | 精灵序列生成       | 从角色参考图生成 2D 逐帧动画                                         |
| `generate_image`                 | 图片生成           | 生成 Texture2D / PNG 图片资产（概念图、UI 背景等）                   |
| `generate_material`              | 材质生成           | 生成 PBR 表面材质（无缝纹理 PNG + `.mat` 文件）                      |
| `generate_skybox`                | 天空盒生成         | 生成天空盒 Cubemap / Skybox 材质                                     |
| `generate_audio_clip`            | 背景音乐生成       | 生成 BGM 和环境音频片段                                              |
| `generate_sound_effect`          | 音效生成           | 生成一次性音效（枪声、脚步声、爆炸等）                               |
| `generate_terrain`               | 地形生成           | 生成大尺度 Unity Terrain 地形并应用到当前场景                        |
| `generate_video`                 | 视频生成           | 生成视频资产（宣传视频、转场视频、场景视频等）                       |
| `search_assets`                  | 资产搜索下载       | 从云端资产库搜索并下载现成资产（搜索→评估→下载）                     |

**子代理（agents/）**：

| Agent                                  | 说明                                         |
| -------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `ai-generation-planner`                | AI 生成规划子代理 - 多任务生成请求拆解与执行规划 |
| `3d-model-generator`                   | 3D 模型生成子代理                            |
| `animated-character-generator`         | 动画角色生成子代理                           |
| `audio-generator`                      | 音频生成子代理                               |
| `image-generator`                      | 图片生成子代理                               |
| `material-generator`                   | 材质生成子代理                               |
| `skybox-generator`                     | 天空盒生成子代理                             |
| `sprite-and-sprite-sequence-generator` | 精灵及序列生成子代理                         |
| `search-assets`                        | 资产搜索与下载子代理                         |
| `video-generator`                      | 视频生成与 VideoPlayer 配置子代理            |

### AI 资产生产 (AI Asset Production)

面向已有资产的接线、放置、地形/骨骼后处理与场景整合。

| Skill                    | 名称               | 说明                                                                 |
| ------------------------ | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `fbx-humanoid-auto-rig`  | FBX Humanoid 自动绑骨 | 使用 UniRig 为任意人形 FBX 自动生成骨架、Humanoid 命名、Skin 与 UV merge |
| `place_assets_in_scene`  | 场景放置专家       | 将已有资产按自然语言要求放入当前场景，支持 Prefab / Sprite / Audio / Material / TerrainData 等 |

### UI 系统 (UI Systems)

| Skill              | 名称            | 说明                                                  |
| ------------------ | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `ui-system-router` | UI 系统路由器   | 判断合适的 UI 系统并路由到正确的专业技能              |
| `imgui`            | IMGUI 专家      | 为编辑器扩展和调试工具生成即时模式 GUI 代码           |
| `ugui`             | uGUI 专家       | 理解现有 UI、进行针对性编辑、生成新的 Canvas 层级结构 |
| `ui-toolkit`       | UI Toolkit 专家 | 生成 UXML/USS 文件、Manipulators、处理 UI 运行时绑定  |

### 环境渲染 (Environment & Rendering)

| Skill           | 名称                 | 说明                                            |
| --------------- | -------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- |
| `cinemachine`   | Cinemachine 3.1 专家 | 使用模块化组件系统创建正确的摄像机设置          |
| `lighting`      | Lighting 专家        | 为 Built-in 和 URP 管线创建、配置和排查场景光照 |
| `scene-creator` | Scene Creator 专家   | 以编程方式构建、验证和修复 2D/3D 场景           |

### 游戏机制 (Gameplay Mechanics)

| Skill          | 名称             | 说明                               |
| -------------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `2d-character` | 2D 角色专家      | 端到端处理角色创建工作流           |
| `auto-wire`    | 资产自动接线专家 | 自动将生成的资产接入用户项目       |
| `input-system` | 输入系统专家     | 确定合适的系统并实现健壮的输入设置 |

## 经验知识库

### 关卡抽取需求文档 (experience/templates-level-extract/)

| 模板           | 说明                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| `LevelExtract` | 关卡抽取试玩广告的标准需求文档模板，包含业务需求约束：纯单机、无存档、无广告、无统计、无远程配置 |

### 试玩广告模板 (experience/templates-playable-ad/)

| 模板                    | 说明                     |
| ----------------------- | ------------------------ |
| `playable_start_page`   | 标题、按钮动画、场景切换 |
| `playable_guide_system` | 目标点、箭头、完成检测   |
| `playable_end_page`     | 分数展示、重玩按钮、微信通知 |

### 调试经验 (experience/development/)

当前内置 **30+ 篇** Unity 开发调试经验文档，涵盖常见问题：

- **UI 问题**：UGUI 遮挡 Camera、EventSystem 缺失导致点击失效、中文/字体显示异常
- **物理问题**：CapsuleCollider 中心漂移、Collider 未设 `isTrigger`、Player 插入地面
- **编译错误**：DLL 访问冲突、Library 缓存错误、匿名类型数组 `CS0826`、私有方法访问
- **渲染问题**：Sprite 半透明边缘、粒子材质显示方块、Standard Shader 光泽度无效
- **运行时问题**：场景对象被禁用、自动射击未实现、相机跟随抖动、游戏状态管理缺失

### 代码模板 (experience/templates/)

| 模板                 | 说明       |
| -------------------- | ---------- |
| `asset_loader`       | 资产加载器 |
| `camera_follow`      | 相机跟随   |
| `collectible_system` | 收集系统   |
| `procedural_meshes`  | 程序化网格 |
| `ui_panels`          | UI 面板    |
